meta.siteDescription: Guide to public transport in Mexico — Metro, Metrobus, Light Rail. Plan your route.
meta.homeTitle: MetroGuia.mx — Your guide to Mexico's metro and public transport

home.heroTitle: Your guide to Mexico's public transport
home.heroSubtitle: Plan your route on metro, metrobus, and light rail. Free, offline, real-time.
home.fifa2026Desc: Mexico hosts the World Cup 2026. Use public transport to reach the stadiums.

route.title: How to get from {origin} to {destination} by metro
route.noRoute: No route found between these stations

worldCup.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 in Mexico
worldCup.subtitle: Public transport guide for World Cup matches
worldCup.tipsSubtitle: Tips for using public transport during the World Cup
worldCup.tipArrivyEarlyDesc: Plan to arrive 90 minutes in advance. The metro fills up on match days.
worldCup.tipBaggageDesc: Large backpacks may not be allowed. Check the stadium's policy.
worldCup.tipCardDesc: The Movilidad card (CDMX) is faster than paying in cash. Recharge it in advance.
worldCup.tipAvoidPeakDesc: If you can, travel before the previous match ends. It will be less crowded.
worldCup.tipOfflineMapDesc: Install MetroGuia as a PWA app to have routes available without internet.
worldCup.tipBatteryDesc: Battery is vital. Carry a backup power bank for emergencies.
worldCup.calendarSubtitle: 13 matches across 3 cities — June to July 2026
worldCup.howToGetAzteca: How to get to Estadio Azteca
worldCup.howToGetAkron: How to get to Estadio Akron
worldCup.howToGetBBVA: How to get to Estadio BBVA
worldCup.metroCardWarning: Metro card does NOT work on Tren Ligero

accommodation.title: Stay near the metro
accommodation.subtitle: Find accommodation near metro stations in Mexico City

common.offlineMessage: You're browsing offline. Some features may not be available.

footer.madeWith: Made with ❤️ for travelers in Mexico

pwa.installDesc: Access offline and calculate routes instantly

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Plan your trip in 3 steps, no apps or mobile data
howItWorks.step1Desc: Enter your origin and destination. The search finds the nearest station with autocomplete.
howItWorks.step2Desc: See lines, transfers, estimated time and cost. Includes safety alerts and tips.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Install the app (PWA) for offline access. Check your route without internet inside the metro.
